quiz.question:
Black moves the king out of check.

Should White trade queens w/Qe4+ and is the knight endgame drawable?

answers.text: White should trade the queens & is able to use the passed b-pawn to draw the knight endgame.

feedback.text: That's right! The passed b-pawn is a crucial asset and Black is going to have to give the knight up to stop it.

distractors.text: White shouldn't trade queens & has better drawing chances with the queens on the board. Black could win the knight endgame.

feedback.text: That's not quite right. You ought to reassess the queen trade - White has a strong asset in the knight endgame!
